ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which this trial belongs */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition for this trial */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presentation type used in this trial */,
  "audio_context_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio context used in this trial */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the additional features used in this trial */,
  "target_number" INTEGER /* Number that participants are asked to respond to */,
  "foil" INTEGER /* Foil number to test against the target number */,
  "response_key" TEXT /* Key pressed by the participant as a response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the participant to respond */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_presentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("presentation_id") REFERENCES presentation_types ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_audio_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_context_id") REFERENCES audio_contexts ("audio_context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial for which the response is recorded */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the response */,
  "response_key" TEXT /* Key pressed as a response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the participant to respond */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response (1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentation_types" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation type */,
  "presentation_type" TEXT /* Description of the presentation type */,
  "presentation_format" TEXT /* Format of the presentation (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_contexts" (
  "audio_context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio context */,
  "audio_context_description" TEXT /* Description of the audio context */,
  "audio_context_type" TEXT /* Type of audio context (e.g., narrative, instructions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., visual cue, auditory cue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy_metrics" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial for which accuracy is calculated */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score achieved in the trial */,
  "accuracy_type" TEXT /* Type of accuracy metric (e.g., proportion correct, reaction time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "researcher_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to this log */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Trial ID associated with this log entry */,
  "date_logged" TEXT /* Date this log entry was created */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the admin user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
